questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Gloria: What are you going to do after you graduate from high school? May: Gloria: I want to learn three foreign languages in college. May: That sounds exciting.
options: To be honest, I have no idea yet.
It might be on the third floor.
After that, you’ll find the location. ˉ - 2 -

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Clerk: How can I help you? Customer: Yes, this desk lamp was broken when I tried to turn it on at home. Clerk: Customer: Great, thanks for your assistance.
options: Believe it or not, it’s just been bought.
I’m sorry, but I can replace it for you.
It seems you’re interested in the house.
The mechanic will fix your car in no time. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Fred: Oops! I left my workbook at home! Jamie: Ms. Kim reminded us just yesterday about it. Fred: There isn’t much I can do. It’s too late for me to go back home now. Jamie: Ms. Kim will be very upset.
options: You are in trouble, my friend.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Zax: What are today’s headlines? Claire: Super Junior canceled tomorrow’s concert. Zax: Claire: You bet. So many fans like me were very excited about seeing their show.
options: It sounds like you’re not into music.
How many fans will be attending it?
Who are the members of the band?
You must feel terribly disappointed. ˉ 公告試題

options: I’m amazed you can do that.
The system has a virus, doesn’t it? ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Jill: When is your monthly test? Larry: Next Thursday. Oh, I’m running out of time! 僅供參考 Jill: Relax! There are still five more days to prepare. Larry: Easy for you to say. Jill: I have confidence in you.
options: I can’t believe he spoke to you this way.
I’m not sure if I can be ready by that time.
But it’s kind of dangerous to run here.
The monthly treatment takes too long. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Operator: City Hall. How may I direct your call? Citizen: Operator: And the reason for your call? Citizen: Well, the park in our neighborhood looks terrible. I mean, there’s litter everywhere and nobody has picked it up. Operator: I see. One moment please.
options: I’d like to speak to Environmental Services, please.
Yes, you may hand the problem to our department.
Read it before you hand it in to the director, please.
Please turn right at the next corner to find the center. ˉ - 3 - ◢

options: But I’m sure the payment I made was correct.
It was just because my grandmother was sick.
I was practicing with the band I’m leading.
I think it broke down a couple of days ago. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Sam: What should I wear to a school interview? Susan: I don’t think you should get overly dressed. You want to look approachable. Sam: Susan: Come on, you’re being so sensitive.
options: A special welcome to all interviewees.
Of course I can wash them for you.
I hope to select the best worker. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Tom: My dad loves my mom very much, even after such a long marriage. Emily: Tom: Well, he always tells her that he loves her the way she is. Emily: That sounds sweet. Tom: And he always kisses her goodbye before going out. Emily: Wow, it seems they are still very much in love after all these years.
options: How can you tell that he does? 公告試題
How long ago did they meet?
What does he wish for most?

What was the wedding like? ˉ III. 綜合測驗:以下兩篇短文,共有 10 個空格,為第 2 2 至 3 1 題,每題有四個 選項,請依各篇短文文意,選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 ▲ 下篇短文共有 5 個空格,為第 2 2 - 26 題,請依短文文意,選出一個最適合該 空格的答案。 僅供參考 Do you prefer reading or watching television in your leisure time? Some people think that watching television is more 22 and relaxing than reading. Reading tends to take so much time, something which the modern person cannot easily afford. 23 these observations might be true, at least to some extent, but reading is still very popular. When you use your 24, a book can become so interesting that you can find it difficult to stop reading it. Besides, 25 different kinds of genres to choose from, so reading can become a hobby for every type of person. You can choose to read a romance, action, or historical novel. If you find it hard to choose a book for 26 enjoyment, you can read reviews or ask friends for advice. Reading can be fun. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Who is Hannah Montana?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What happens at the friend’s birthday party?
options: Her friend, the birthday girl, does not come to the party.
Miley comes to the party as a normal-looking teenager.
Everybody pays more attention to Miley than to her friend.
The birthday is canceled because of a sudden power failure. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Based on the ideas of paragraph 3, where might Miley be?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Based on the passage, what kind of movie is Hannah Montana?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Which of the following is NOT mentioned about Miley in the passage?
options: She is not as ordinary as many people think.
She fails to collect all the eggs for breakfast.
She cares much about her friends and family.

She breaks up with Travis and has a broken heart. 公告試題 ˉ ˉ ▲ 閱讀下文,回答第 37 - 41 題 Changdong is in the north of Seoul in South Korea. Only a few hundred thousand people live there, and it has few facilities. It is not as wealthy as many other places in Seoul, but after 2021, it will be one of the most exciting places to visit. The reason for this is Korean popular music, which everybody knows as K - pop - the South Korean government wants Changdong to become the K - pop capital of the world. 僅供參考 South Korea knows that K - pop is very important. In 2015, South Korea made $ 5 billion from selling K - pop music and related TV shows, films, games, and so on. Furthermore, because of K - pop, other Korean products like Samsung smartphones, Korean - made cars, and Korean - style cl othes have become very popular. K - pop is very global today. For a long time, it has been very popular in China, Japan, Taiwan, and Hong Kong. However, Billboard magazine found a different trend between 2013 and 2016. During this time, the United States was the third biggest buyer of K - po p music. Thus, it can be said that K - pop has a lot of fans in the West today. To attract fans from around the world, there are big plans for Changdong. It will have concert halls, music schools, recording studios, art galleries, and a K - pop museum. The p lace that will be the most important venue, however, is the huge arena. About 20,000 fans will be able to enjoy K - pop events there. Since it is a very big and important project, the arena, which won ’ t be completed unti l 2021, is already being built. When e verything is finished, Changdong will be a very exciting place to visit. For K - pop fans, it will be the coolest place on earth! - 6 -

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Where is Changdong?
options: In the west of Seoul. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What does the South Korean government want to do to Changdong?
options: They want to reduce the number of visitors going there.
They want to change it into the K-pop capital of the world.
They want only a few hundred thousand people to live there.
They want to protect its beautiful natural environment. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What can be inferred from the passage about other Korean products?
options: They were seen less often on TV. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What happened between 2013 and 2016?
options: Asian people tended to buy less K-pop than American people.
Billboard magazine was eventually founded in America by then.
K-pop unexpectedly gained a larger customer base in America.
A lot of passionate fans traveled to America to spread K-pop. ˉ 公告試題

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Which of the following is NOT mentioned in the passage about the facilities?
options: Fans that visit Changdong will feel excited because of them.
The main facility will take some time to build.
The facilities will include some venues for education.

20,000 people will attend the opening of the arena. ˉ 僅供參考 二、 非 選擇 題 ( 第 I 到 第 III 題,每 題 6 分,共 1 8 分 ) I. 填充 說明: ▲ 請依據中文提示,將試題內空格 1 、 2 答案之完整單字 ( 含提示之字首 ), 分別作答於答案卷之作答欄 1 、 2 之指定範圍內以完成句子。 ▲ 請勿抄題,每格限填一字,超過一字者視為錯誤,不予計分。
